verdict: A powerful antioxidant serum using the synergistic resveratrol + ferulic acid combination for photoprotection and anti-aging. The Ordinary's transparency provides clear concentrations, though this combo offers subtle results requiring consistency.

_research.name: COSRX Hydrium Watery Toner
_research.con: Results are gradual and protective rather than visibly transformative; requires consistent use and SPF.
